Configuration settings for the JerryScript application on the Curie BSP with Zephyr OS support.

# Purpose
This configuration file enables and sets various features and components for a software project. It activates automatic service initialization (`CONFIG_AUTO_SERVICE_INIT=y`), proxy configuration (`CONFIG_CFW_PROXY=y`), and logging for a slave device (`CONFIG_LOG_SLAVE=y`). It specifies the memory pool definition path (`CONFIG_MEM_POOL_DEF_PATH="$(PROJECT_PATH)/arc"`) and sets the operating system to Zephyr (`CONFIG_OS_ZEPHYR=y`). The file also configures services and implementations for Quark SE ADC and GPIO (`CONFIG_SERVICES_QUARK_SE_ADC_IMPL=y`, `CONFIG_SERVICES_QUARK_SE_GPIO_IMPL=y`), and enables GPIO and ADC support for the system-on-chip (`CONFIG_SOC_GPIO_AON=y`, `CONFIG_SOC_GPIO=y`, `CONFIG_SS_ADC=y`, `CONFIG_SS_GPIO=y`). Additionally, it configures test command support (`CONFIG_TCMD_SLAVE=y`, `CONFIG_TCMD=y`) and sets the Zephyr board to "arduino_101_sss" (`CONFIG_ZEPHYR_BOARD="arduino_101_sss"`). Finally, it enables the console handler shell (`CONFIG_CONSOLE_HANDLER_SHELL=y`).
